message:
test(config): add comprehensive unit tests for config package

Increased coverage from 12.4% to 94.2% (target: 80%)

Added tests for:
- Config loading from file (valid, invalid, missing)
- Agent commands (default and custom)
- Tmux settings (default and custom)
- Agent Mail config and env var overrides
- Model aliases and GetModelName()
- Palette loading from Markdown and TOML
- CreateDefault and Print functions
- XDG and tilde path handling

Closes ntm-w6p
